title: Upon Patrick, A Footman. Epig.
content:
Now Patrick with his footmanship has done,
    His eyes and ears strive which should fastest run.
meaning:
"Upon Patrick, A Footman. Epig." is a quintessential example of Robert Herrick's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
